info.title: NuGettier
info.description: A nuget helper tool for dotnet with integrated support for Unity package creation.

hookCapture.patchTarget: ProcessExit-fallback (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: search
commands.description: search for term or package id

commands.name: list
commands.description: list available version for a given package

commands.name: info
commands.description: retrieve information about a specific version of a given package

commands.name: get
commands.description: download the given NuPkg at the given version

commands.name: deps
commands.description: retrieve information about a specific version of a given package

commands.name: upm
commands.description: root command for a number of commands specific to Unity packages

commands.name: info
commands.description: preview Unity package informations for the given NuPkg at the given version

commands.name: pack
commands.description: repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package

commands.name: unpack
commands.description: same as `upm pack`, but writing the unpacked files to the output directory

commands.name: publish
commands.description: repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package and publish

arguments.name: inputItems
arguments.description: input files and folders, and/or wildcard patterns

commands.name: amalgamate
commands.description: root command for a number of commands specific to amalgamated Unity packages

commands.name: info
commands.description: preview Unity package informations for the given NuPkg at the given version

commands.name: pack
commands.description: repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package

commands.name: unpack
commands.description: same as `upm pack`, but writing the unpacked files to the output directory

commands.name: publish
commands.description: repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package and publish
